title: 30th Anniversary Collection (disambiguation)
content:
'''30th Anniversary Collection''' may refer to one of the following:

*''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'', [[Hasbro Inc.|Hasbro's]] [[2007]]-[[2008]] toy line
*[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)|''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection'']], a limited [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series
